who: paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month
offer: For paralegals in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, manual review causes missed compliance issues. We analyze contracts instead of manual review.
problem: Identifying potential issues in legal contracts
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for paralegals seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on contract workflows
DM outreach to paralegals with demo video links
Join forums where paralegals share tools and resources
try_it: Let users try contract issue flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing contracts
Provide one-click export of summary reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
